## Before submitting

Please read our contribution guidelines before opening a pull request:

➡️ [**CONTRIBUTING.md**](https://github.com/Abhishekrazy/pcsx5/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)

By opening this pull request, you confirm that you have read and agree
to follow the contribution guidelines.

## Testing

If applicable, list the game(s) and/or CTest targets you exercised and
briefly describe the results.

Example:

- Super Monkey Ball Banana Mania (PPSA01668) – Boots to main menu.
- `ctest -R kernel_memory` – All tests pass.

If your changes do not affect runtime behavior (e.g. documentation,
tooling, CI), write `N/A`.

## Checklist

By submitting this pull request, you confirm that:

- [ ] I have read and followed `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] The project builds with MSVC (`/W4 /WX`) and the CTest suite passes.
- [ ] I tested my changes or marked the testing section as `N/A`.
- [ ] I wrote this pull request description myself and did not paste AI-generated explanations.
- [ ] My change contains no Sony proprietary code, firmware, keys, or decrypted assets.
